calendar.matters:
Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Jul-07-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Removal of David Cronin as Executor was taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Continued To Jul-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Removal of Executor was continued to July 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Parties to take the matter off calendar or make an appearance and explain what is happening.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Continued To Jun-23-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Gottschalk for David Cronin. David Packard for Judith Packard.

Counsel reported that a Trust has been drafted, that no appraisal of the property was presented, that the value of the property is more than sufficient to satisfy the judgment and asked to be allowed to submit an order with the trust attached for the Court's signature. Mr. Gottschalk stated that he would like to see some similar provisions from Ms. Foster. The Clerk noted that the relief sought was not requested in the current petition. The Petition for Removal of David Cronin as Executor was continued to June 23, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for resolution of whether the current petition can be dismissed and to see if any additional petitions need to be filed.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Continued To Mar-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Robert Gottschalk for David Cronin (Executor).

The Court noted that Mr. Packard has received authorization to appear by Court Call but he has failed to set up the call. Mr. Gottschalk stated that he will file the Substitution of Attorney today. Discussions were held with regard to setting up a trust pursuant to the Will. The Petition for Removal of Executor is continued to March 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Oct-15-2013 Continued To Jan-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Packard for Judith Foster. David Cronin in Propria Persona.

Mr. Cronin stated that $25,000.00 was paid to Judith Foster, and that he needs an Attorney to draw up an irrevocable trust but he is unable to find one. Mr. Packard stated that he wants an irrevocable trust or a constructive trust. Mr. Cronin also spoke of the option to liquidate the property and pay Judith $460,000.00. The Petition for Removal of David Cronin as Executor was continued to January 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Continued To Oct-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Continued To Sep-17-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Packer for Judith Foster. David Cronin in Propria Persona.

Mr. Cronin stated that his Son (Forest Cronin) was not available today. The Parties stepped out of the courtroom to discuss the matter. Upon returning, the Parties reported that they agree to a $25,000.00 value on the personal property which is to paid by David Cronin to Judith Foster before October 25, 2013 with a stay of execution if he fails to pay the stipulated amount with a right to execute on a judgment. Mr. Packard stated that this does not waive Judith's rights with regard to the issue residual beneficiary. The Parties also agree to a constructive trust against the properties. Mr. Packard also raised the issue of equity in the properties to protect Judith's interest. The Petition for Removal of David Cronin as Executor was continued to September 17, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Continued To Jun-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Cronin in Properia Persona. David Packard for Judith Foster (Petitioner).

Mr. Cronin stated that there has not been any further movement along and that his issues are improper distribution of funds to Forest that were used for purchasing investments (property in San Mateo and San Diego county), and locating Judith's personal property. Mr. Cronin also stated that he is willing to sell his own property to pay the value of Judith's missing items (about $15,000.00 to $16,000.00) to Judith and he requests returning to court with Forest. The Court noted that a blocked trust account should have been set up for Forest with distributions at age 30 and 35, and if Forest were to pass before age 35 then Judith is to receive the balance. Mr. Packard requested that a professional fiduciary should serve as executor and insists that Mr. Cronin provide financial records of his joint account with Forest and records of the property that Forest purchased. The Petition for Removal of David Cronin as Executor was continued to June 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Cronin is to call Forest within 24 hours and then call to Clerk to confirm his availability. Mr. Cronin and Mr. Pacakard are to talk about the value of the property that was to be distributed to Judith. The Court will issue an Order to Appear to Forest Cronin indicating what documents need to be provided (once a date is provided by Mr. Cronin).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Continued To Apr-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Continued To Feb-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Continued To Jan-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Packard for Judith Foster. David Cronin in Propria Persona.

The Court reminded Mr. Cronin that the Order on Distribution said that the funds were to be placed in a Trust with a Trustee and that it provides that the funds remain in a Trust with many provisions until Forest reaches age 35. Mr. Cronin stated that he and Forest no longer have a relationship with the Trustee, that he and Mr. Hughes had a falling out, that the money is not in a joint account and that Forest has control of the money (some invested/$100,000.00 in his possession for school). In addition, Mr. Cronin stated that he was going to speak to an Attorney today to seek advise, that will look for the personal items which are located in storage, that he was having difficulty locating the box of coins and that he will deliver the items to Mr. Packard's office. Mr. Cronin also stated that the Burlingame address is a good address and provided the Clerk with an e mail address which he checks regularly as well as his cell phone number. The Clerk provided Mr. Cronin with the Probate Examiner's e mail address as well. The Petition for Removal of David Cronin as Executor was continued to January 22, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on distribution to Judith and status on Forest's Trust.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Oct-16-2012 Continued To Nov-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Packard for Judith Foster.

The Court noted that Mr. Cronin was not present. Mr. Packard stated that Mr. Cronin called him late yesterday, that Mr. Cronin stated that he was still unable to hire an Attorney and that Mr. Cronin was aware of the hearing. In addition, Mr. Packard stated that Mr. Cronin acknowledged that he had not turned the property/items that were safe deposit box, that Mr. Cronin stated that the will did not require a Trust, that he set up a joint account with Forrest (Minor now 19 years old) and suggested the Court issue a Oder to Show Cause Re Contempt. Furthermore, Mr. Packard stated that he has not spoken to Ms. Dolch about serving as Trustee, that he did know if Mr. Boldan had taken any action and that Mr. Cronin stated that he would return the property to his Client the next time he was in town. The Petition for Removal of Executor was continued to November 20, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will research the reqeust to issue an OSC Re: Contempt.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Continued To Oct-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Packard for Judith Foster (Petitioner).

The Court received a call from David Cronin this morning requesting time to hire new Counsel. Mr. Cronin's phone number was provided to Mr. Foster. The Petition for Removal of David Cronin As Executor was continued to October 16, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition For Removal Of David Cronin As Executor,
Off Calendar Jul-03-2012 Continued To Aug-28-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel-Civil
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Packard for and with Judith Foster (Petitioner in the Petition for Removal). Harold Hughes (Petitioner in the Motion to be Relieved as Counsel).

Mr. Packard reported that there were coins, jewlery and guns that have not been distributed and a Trust for the grandson was not funded. Mr. Hughes has no contact with Mr. Cronin (Executor). The Court granted the Motion to be Relieved as Counsel (subject to review of order). The Coust suspended the powers of the Executor and a Citation will be issued to the Executor to appear on August 28, 2012. Mr. Packard will get a consent from Debra Dolch to act as successor. The Petition for Removal is continued to August 28, 2012 at 9:00 am. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Lelu.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harold Hughes for David Cronin (Petitioner). Judith Foster was also present.

Mr. Hughes stated that there was no objection what so ever, that Forest was of majority age, that Forest willingly gave up his right to receive distributions and that Forest understood the consent for the outright distribution to Judith. The Court granted the Petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
